title: The Weekly Challenge - 175
task1_desc: Write a script to list `Last Sunday` of every month in the given year.
task1_body:
Write a script to list `Last Sunday` of every month in the given year. For example, for year 2022, we should get the following:
2022-01-30 2022-02-27 2022-03-27 2022-04-24 2022-05-29 2022-06-26 2022-07-31 2022-08-28 2022-09-25 2022-10-30 2022-11-27 2022-12-25
task2_desc: Write a script to generate first `20 Perfect Totient Numbers`. Please checkout [**wikipedia page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Perfect_totient_number) for more informations.
task2_body:
Write a script to generate first `20 Perfect Totient Numbers`. Please checkout [**wikipedia page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Perfect_totient_number) for more informations.
#### Output
3, 9, 15, 27, 39, 81, 111, 183, 243, 255, 327, 363, 471, 729, 2187, 2199, 3063, 4359, 4375, 5571
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 31st July 2022**.
